creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 197868
patch to update the port

- update 2.059 -> 2.060
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/IO-Socket-SSL
- "portlint -AC" just warns about non-empty $FreeBSD$ tag.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180601 runs ok at 11.2-release-amd64,
	pkg 1.10.99.10, perl 5.26.2 and with:
		1) ssl=openssl
		2) ssl=openssl-devel
		3) ssl=libressl
		4) ssl=libressl-devel
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail in all cases say: "PASS".
